issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
issue.errorLine1: val info = sm.activeSubscriptionInfoList?.firstOrNull { it.subscriptionId == subId } ?: return null
val info = sm.activeSubscriptionInfoList?.firstOrNull { it.subscriptionId == subId } ?: return null

issue.message: Missing permissions required by TelephonyManager.getDataNetworkType: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE or android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STATE
Missing permissions required by TelephonyManager.getVoiceNetworkType: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE or android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STATE
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details

issue.errorLine1: <string name="brand_subtitle">TurboIMS Fork · Carrier and IMS Toolkit</string>
<string name="ims_registration_per_sim_desc">In All SIM mode, IMS registration is handled per SIM and results may differ.</string>
<string name="country_iso_actual_mcc_note">Current network MCC: %1$s (ISO override only, MCC unchanged)</string>
<string name="country_iso_actual_mcc_mnc_note">Current network MCC/MNC: %1$s/%2$s (ISO override only, MCC unchanged)</string>
<string name="country_iso_mnc_desc">Current SIM MNC, used to build MCCMNC for carrier matching</string>
<string name="country_iso_quick_pick_placeholder">Pick a common country, or choose \"Other\" to input MCC + ISO</string>
<string name="issue_failure_hint_desc">Submit an Issue with system info and failure logs.</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_desc">Fixes cases where network is connected in China but shows \"Restricted\" or an exclamation mark and has no internet.</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_status_checking">Checking current verification URLs and network reachability…</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_status_need_fix">Default verification may be unreachable. A one-tap fix is recommended.</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_status_restorable">China (.cn) verification URLs are active. You can restore system defaults anytime.</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_status_normal">Verification network is reachable. No fix needed.</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_requires_shizuku">Start and authorize Shizuku before running this fix.</string>
<string name="captive_portal_fix_success">Network fix applied. If the status does not update, reconnect the network and retry.</string>
<string name="tiktok_network_fix_desc">Domestic SIM only: ON uses random numeric ISO; OFF restores country ISO by SIM home profile.</string>
<string name="network_exit_desc">Checks public IP and common service reachability after you tap.</string>
<string name="qs_guide_desc">Add tiles to Android Quick Settings for faster access.</string>
<string name="config_backup_desc">Back up %s switch settings. IMS registration is not included.</string>
<string name="reset_config_desc">Reset clears current SIM overrides and restores carrier defaults.</string>
<string name="diagnostics_all_sim_fallback">Using primary SIM for detailed checks: %1$s</string>
<string name="restore_confirm_message">This clears current SIM overrides and restores current system carrier configuration. Continue?</string>
<string name="sim_list_refresh_failed_restart_shizuku">SIM list read failed, please restart Shizuku service and refresh again</string>
<string name="config_apply_success_message">Configuration has been applied.\nIf Wi-Fi is connected, turn off Wi-Fi, then check the 5G/5G+ icon and test mobile data.</string>
<string name="ims_register_apply_failed">Apply failed, IMS registration not triggered: %s</string>
<string name="ims_register_unknown">IMS status read failed. Try again shortly.</string>
